title: Registry State Schema (Read Model)
description: Registry State is a deterministic read-model projection of CIR data. It is derived exclusively from CIR.identity_state within the Asveora Unified Identity Model (AUIM). This schema MUST NOT introduce independent identity classification or authority decisions.

registry_id.description: Unique identifier for this registry state snapshot

instance_origin.description: Network Instance that owns this registry state view

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this registry state was generated

identity_count.description: Total number of CIRs represented in this registry snapshot

active_identities.description: CIRs projected into ACTIVE state. MUST be derived exclusively from CIR.identity_state = ACTIVE within AUIM. No independent classification permitted.

suspended_identities.description: CIRs projected into SUSPENDED state. MUST be derived exclusively from CIR.identity_state = SUSPENDED.

tombstoned_identities.description: Permanently deactivated identities. Derived exclusively from CIR.identity_state = TOMBSTONED.

migrating_identities.description: Identities undergoing migration. Derived exclusively from CIR.identity_state = MIGRATING.

registry_metadata.description: Non-authoritative operational metadata for diagnostics and observability. MUST NOT influence identity truth, CIR state, or registry classification logic.

last_commit_id.description: Latest commit identifier in registry commit chain

commit_chain_tip.description: Pointer to latest commit in append-only registry chain. MUST conform to commit-lifecycle.lifecycle_id format.

federation_origin.description: Non-authoritative provenance metadata. MUST NOT be used to infer identity trust, authority, or validation outcomes.
